INSERT INTO [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL_NEW_TR_1]

SELECT * FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL_NEW_1] 
WHERE EOMONTH(CAST([DATE] AS DATE)) IN ('2025-05-31','2025-06-30','2025-07-31','2025-08-31');

WHERE EOMONTH(CAST([DATE] AS DATE)) IN ('2025-05-31','2025-06-30','2025-07-31','2025-08-31');
